item.title: [Gold Job] WE ARE HIRING – ORDINARY SEAMAN (OS) FOR WIND FARM VESSEL at
[Gold Job] HIRING NOW – ETO DPM (Offshore) at
[Gold Job] (DED) DECK ENGINE DRIVER SUPERVISOR at

item.description:
Location: Worldwide
Description:

We’re continuously looking to connect with experienced and motivated DPOs for upcoming offshore projects on DP vessels. Whether you’re currently available or exploring your next opportunity, we welcome you to get in touch. 

At True Horizon Crewing, we value teamwork, clear communication, and long-term partnerships — both with our crew and our clients. If you’re seeking a professional yet personal crewing experience, you’ll enjoy working with us.

To be considered, you should have:

  • Experience as DPO on DP-II heavy lift or offshore construction vessels
  • Valid DP and STCW certification
  • BOSIET
  • Travel documents in order for short-notice deployment

Requirements:

  • DP Certification
  • Dutch COC Endorsement
  • Valid STCW certificates
  • BOSIET training

We work with both EU and international candidates with proven offshore experience. If this sounds like you, we’d love to hear from you.



Apply to this job
item.title: [Hot Job] Dynamic Positioning Operator (DPO) at True Horizon Crewing

item.description:
Location:
Description:

We are looking for a Chief Officer / Marof for a coaster vessel operating mainly in North West Europe on short sea trade, offering a stable rotation and a practical, hands-on working environment onboard.

This role suits officers who enjoy working in a smaller crew, combining navigational responsibilities with day-to-day involvement in deck operations, cargo handling and technical oversight onboard. You will act as the Captain’s right hand and play a key role in the safe and efficient operation of the vessel.

The position may suit both experienced officers and motivated junior candidates looking to take the next step in their career. The vessel owner operates a fleet in a dynamic trading pattern with sea and river voyages.

Assignment Details:

  • Position: Chief Officer / Marof
  • Vessel: Coaster vessel
  • Trading area: Sea and river trade / short sea operations
  • Duration: 8 weeks on / 8 weeks off
  • Dayrate: In line with sector standards

True Horizon Crewing is a Netherlands based maritime crewing agency specialised in providing experienced offshore and marine professionals including Masters, Chief Officers, Engineers and DPO’s.

At True Horizon Crewing, we value clear communication, professionalism, and long-term relationships — even for short-term assignments. We work closely with both our crew and clients to ensure smooth operations and transparent cooperation.



Apply to this job
item.title: [Hot Job] Chief Officer Marof for a coaster vessel at True Horizon Crewing

item.description:
Location: Netherlands
Description:

We are looking for a Master for a modern patrol vessel operating in the Netherlands, with an intended start in early May.

This assignment suits an experienced maritime professional who enjoys working on modern vessels in a hands-on environment with a high level of responsibility. The Master will be responsible for the safe navigation, daily operation and overall management of the vessel, while maintaining strong standards of safety, professionalism and clear communication on board.

The initial assignment starts in early May. For the right candidate, there is the possibility of moving into a 4-week on / 4-week off rotation if the cooperation proves successful.

Assignment Details:

  • Position: Master
  • Vessel: Patrol vessel
  • Location: The Netherlands
  • Sign-on: Early May
  • Duration: Initial 4 week rotation
  • Rotation potential: 4 weeks on / 4 weeks off

At True Horizon Crewing, we value clear communication, professionalism, and long-term relationships — even for short-term assignments. We work closely with both our crew and clients to ensure smooth operations and transparent cooperation.

Requirements:

  • Netherlands nationality
  • Valid Master COC for 500GT or above
  • Relevant and valid STCW certificates
  • Preferably experience on smaller vessels, patrol vessels or workboats

Interested in this opportunity? Contact us directly at:



Apply to this job
item.title: [Hot Job] Master for a modern patrol vessel operating in the Netherlands at True Horizon Crewing

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Recruitment That Puts People First — Since Day One

OffshoreCrew AS is based in Kristiansand, on Norway's southern coast — the heart of Scandinavia's offshore cluster. We are not a volume crewing factory. We are a recruitment consultancy built on one principle: people's satisfaction comes first. We believe in candidates and clients, not just transactions.

What We Cover:

  • Traditional Offshore Oil & Gas

  • Maritime shipping & marine operations

  • Cruise industry

  • Marine & aquaculture

  • Emerging floating renewable industries — wind, wave, and next-gen offshore energy

Our Edge — The e-Crew Personnel Database:

Beyond standard recruitment, we run a unique digital platform where clients post jobs, search CVs, and recruit directly based on specific knowledge and experience. No middlemen. No delays. Direct match between demand and qualified supply.

Positions We Supply:

Marine Crew: Masters, Chief Officers, 2nd/3rd Officers, DPOs, Chief Engineers, 2nd/3rd Engineers, Electricians, ETOs, Crane Operators (G5, Sparrows Stage 2 & 3), ABs, Chief Stewards, Cooks, Stewards

Project Personnel: Client Reps, Safety Officers, Medics, Bridge Supervisors, Deck Foremen, Lifting Supervisors, Banksman/Slingers, Riggers, Roustabouts, Storemen, Deck Operators, Radio Admins, Helideck Teams

ROV & Subsea Construction: ROV Client Reps, ROV Superintendents, ROV Supervisors, ROV Pilots & Technicians, Divers, Diver Supervisors, Survey Engineers, Surveyors, Senior Electricians, Tooling Supervisors, Tooling Technicians, Data Processors, Senior Mechanics

Drilling: OIMs, Barge Masters, Barge Engineers, Toolpushers, Drillers, Derrickmen, Roughnecks, Mud Engineers, Electricians, Mechanics, Roustabouts

Why OffshoreCrew?

  • Faster placement — our e-Crew database matches skills to jobs in real time

  • Better access — one profile, multiple industries: oil & gas, renewables, maritime, cruise

  • Local knowledge, global reach — Norwegian base, worldwide network

  • Philosophy, not policy — we treat candidates like clients and clients like partners

There is simply no other recruitment company doing what we do. Register your CV, browse live positions, or let our consultants match you directly.



Apply to this job
item.title: [Hot Job] Intelligent Offshore & Maritime Recruitment — All Seabased Industries (Norway & Worldwide) at OffshoreCrew AS
[Gold Job] ETO on SCOV DP2 – 400-435 EUR per day at
